extracted_definition: SHIFT = NONE; SCALE_I = NONE for canonical output axis (current_mA comes directly from meta.Current_mA); SCALE_S = S_percent := change_pct, where change_pct(k) = 100*(avg_p2p(k)/refBase(k)) for pulseScheme.mode ~= repeated, and change_pct(k) = 100*(blockJumpMetric(k)/refBase(k)) for pulseScheme.mode == repeated; WIDTH_USED = NO

DeltaS is residual := Smap - Scdf. Rfill := residual with non-finite entries replaced by 0. If any(abs(Rfill))>0: [U,Sigma,V]=svd(Rfill,'econ'); phi1 := V(:,1); kappa1 := U(:,1)*Sigma(1,1); phiScale := max(abs(phi1)); if phiScale>0 then phi1 := phi1/phiScale and kappa1 := kappa1*phiScale; signCorr := SpearmanCorr(Speak,kappa1); if signCorr<0 then phi1 := -phi1 and kappa1 := -kappa1. Averaging over T: NONE (single SVD over full T x I residual matrix).

kappa1 is the first left-singular mode amplitude: kappa1 := U(:,1)*Sigma(1,1), then multiplied by phiScale after Phi1 normalization; optional joint sign flip with Phi1 if SpearmanCorr(Speak,kappa1)<0. Dependence on S_peak/Speak: only via this sign-correction check, not in primary SVD magnitude formula.

For each T row with >=3 valid I points and Speak>0: cdfRaw := svalid/Speak; clamp to [0,1]; enforce nondecreasing by forward pass; normalize by last value if >0. PT_pdf p := gradient(cdfRaw,Ivalid); replace non-finite with 0; clamp p>=0; area-normalize with trapz. CDF_pt := cumtrapz(Ivalid,p); normalize by last value if >0; clamp to [0,1]. S_CDF (Scdf) := Speak * CDF_pt. Full model: Sfull := Scdf + kappa1*phi1'. Validation compares RMSE_PT (Smap vs Scdf) and RMSE_FULL (Smap vs Sfull), row-wise and global; RECONSTRUCTION_IMPROVES := YES iff RMSE_FULL < RMSE_PT.
